BOS.note: Tatum returns healthy. Expensive core, near first apron. Need internal development and smart exceptions.

CHA.note: Young core with significant cap flexibility. Below aprons, potential buyer at deadline.

CLE.note: Expensive core with Mitchell, Mobley, Allen. Harden re-signing. Likely at first apron.

DET.note: Young core with Cunningham. Mid-tier contracts for trade flexibility. Duren's extension is key.

TOR.note: Expensive core, near first apron. May shed salary if not contending. Barnes is key.

DEN.note: Expensive championship core, near second apron. Limited flexibility. Jokic's extension looms.

GSW.note: Pursuing LeBron/AD, implying major overhaul. Likely hard-capped at first apron. Curry aging.

HOU.note: Expensive roster, over second apron. Durant aging, VanVleet returns. Young core needs development.

LAL.note: Doncic era. Ayton opted in, but trade possible. LeBron's decision is key. Roster incomplete.

POR.note: Young core with Henderson/Sharpe. Lillard returns from Achilles. Below aprons. Consolidation trades likely.

SAS.note: Deep young core on cheap deals. Significant cap flexibility. High upside, potential buyer.
